summary: Type-safe REST API client generation using interface-first design and modern HttpClient practices.
recommendedPatterns: Define typed HTTP interfaces rather than ad hoc request strings.
Prefer System.Text.Json unless compatibility requires Newtonsoft.
Use IHttpClientFactory where the host platform supports it.
avoidPatterns: Do not hand-roll repetitive REST clients when a typed Refit interface is a better fit.
Do not ignore response error modeling and API exception handling.
setupSteps: Create interface contracts for HTTP APIs.
Register typed clients with the host container or factory integration.
commonPitfalls: Guessing package/API names without checking Refit contracts.
Ignoring API error surfaces or serialization choices.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
